dorks.description: Anthropic API key (sk-ant-api03- prefix) exposed in .env file
dorks.remediation: Revoke immediately at console.anthropic.com → API Keys. Purge from git history with `git filter-repo --path .env --invert-paths`.

dorks.description: Anthropic API key hardcoded in Python source file
dorks.remediation: Revoke immediately at console.anthropic.com → API Keys and replace with os.environ or a secrets manager.

dorks.description: Anthropic API key hardcoded in JavaScript/TypeScript source
dorks.remediation: Revoke immediately at console.anthropic.com → API Keys and replace with process.env or a secrets manager.

dorks.description: OpenAI project API key (sk-proj- prefix) exposed in .env file
dorks.remediation: Revoke immediately at platform.openai.com/api-keys. Purge from git history.

dorks.description: OpenAI project API key hardcoded in Python source
dorks.remediation: Revoke immediately at platform.openai.com/api-keys and replace with an environment variable.

dorks.description: OpenAI project API key hardcoded in JavaScript/TypeScript source
dorks.remediation: Revoke immediately at platform.openai.com/api-keys and replace with process.env.

dorks.description: Google API key (AIzaSy prefix, used for Gemini) exposed in .env file
dorks.remediation: Revoke immediately at console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials. Purge from git history.

dorks.description: Google/Gemini API key hardcoded in Python source
dorks.remediation: Revoke at console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials and replace with an environment variable.

dorks.description: Google/Gemini API key hardcoded in JavaScript/TypeScript source
dorks.remediation: Revoke at console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials and replace with process.env.

dorks.description: GitHub classic PAT (ghp_ prefix) exposed in .env file
dorks.remediation: Revoke immediately at github.com/settings/tokens. Audit token activity log for unauthorized usage.

dorks.description: GitHub fine-grained PAT (github_pat_ prefix) exposed in .env file
dorks.remediation: Revoke immediately at github.com/settings/tokens. Audit token activity log for unauthorized usage.

dorks.description: GitHub PAT hardcoded in YAML (likely CI/CD config)
dorks.remediation: Revoke immediately at github.com/settings/tokens and replace with GitHub Actions encrypted secrets.
